strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex systems including GIS platforms and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong track record of open-source contributions, tooling development, and knowledge sharing through workshops and talks
concerns: Job title inflation (e.g., Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq with no prior mid-level roles listed) raises questions about actual seniority alignment
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services beyond CDK — key required/nice-to-have skills are underrepresented
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required and may impact daily collaboration
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript and React, strong architectural awareness, and notable open-source contributions, but lacks clear alignment with required database and cloud tools, and the limited German proficiency may hinder effective on-site collaboration in a high-touch environment.
